dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: LibreHealth EHR NHANES SQL dump - layout_options table shows field_id='email' for DEM form
LibreHealth EHR NHANES SQL dump - form_id='DEM' is used throughout layout_options for Demographics form
NHANES SQL dump shows UOR mapping: 0=Unused (contrastart, pricelevel), 1=Optional (email, phone fields), 2=Required (DOB, fname, sex)
NHANES SQL dump - fields with UOR=0 (contrastart, pricelevel) represent hidden/unused fields
NHANES SQL dump - fields with UOR=1 (email, phone_biz, postal_code, city) represent optional fields
NHANES SQL dump - fields with UOR=2 (DOB, fname, sex, lname) represent required fields in Demographics form
NHANES SQL dump INSERT statement: ('DEM', 'email', '1Face Sheet', 'Contact Email', 70, 2, 1, 30, 95, '', 1, 1, '', '', 'Contact Email Address', 0, '', 'F', '')

CDC official NHANES website (https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/nhanes/) confirms NHANES is a real, publicly-available survey. LibreHealth setup script downloads 9,375 real patient records from official NHANES SQL dump.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on LibreHealth EHR using real NHANES patient data (9,375 real records from CDC National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey). The email field in the Demographics form (form_id='DEM', field_id='email') currently has UOR value of 1 (Optional). The task requires changing this to UOR value 2 (Required). The UOR field values are: 0=Unused, 1=Optional, 2=Required.
